title: prunella grandiflora
intro: Prunella grandiflora, also known as self-heal or heal-all, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Prunella grandiflora have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Prunella grandiflora can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
